description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and release, using a before_script that defines JOB_TIMESTAMP, COMMIT_HASH_SHORT, COMMIT_BRANCH_OR_TAG, REGISTRY_HOST, REGISTRY_USER, REGISTRY_PASSWORD, REGISTRY_IMAGE and optionally CERTIFICATE_URL. In the build stage add a build job that runs on the gradle:4.10-jdk8-alpine image, executes `gradle build`, and stores the resulting `build/libs/*-all.jar`, `build/distributions/*shadow*.tar` and `build/reports` as artifacts. Also in the build stage add a build-docker-master job on the docker:latest image that logs the computed variables, logs in to $REGISTRY_HOST with $REGISTRY_USER/$REGISTRY_PASSWORD, runs `docker build --pull -t "$REGISTRY_IMAGE:$COMMIT_BRANCH_OR_TAG-$COMMIT_HASH_SHORT" .` and pushes the image with `docker push "$REGISTRY_IMAGE:$COMMIT_BRANCH_OR_TAG-$COMMIT_HASH_SHORT"`. In the release stage add a release-docker job on docker:latest that logs in, pulls the image built earlier, retags it to `$REGISTRY_IMAGE:$COMMIT_BRANCH_OR_TAG`, and pushes it. Also in the release stage add a release-docker-master job that runs only on the master branch, logs in, pulls the same image, retags it to `$REGISTRY_IMAGE` (latest), and pushes it; the pipeline uses a docker:dind service with a custom entrypoint that injects a certificate from $CERTIFICATE_URL if provided, otherwise starts Docker normally.
